PHOTO_TIMER.label: Slideshow Interval
PHOTO_TIMER.description: Time in seconds to display each photo before advancing to the next slide.

show_countdown_timer.label: Show Countdown Timer
show_countdown_timer.description: Display a countdown timer showing remaining time for the current slide.

VIDEO_MAX_TIMER.label: Max Video Duration
VIDEO_MAX_TIMER.description: Maximum time in seconds to play each video. Videos longer than this will be cut off.

show_date_overlay.label: Show Date Overlay
show_date_overlay.description: Display the photo date on the slide.

show_location_overlay.label: Show Location Overlay
show_location_overlay.description: Display the photo location on the slide.

TRANSITION_EFFECT.label: Transition Effect
TRANSITION_EFFECT.description: Visual transition between slides. Fade smoothly fades through black. Cut switches instantly.

TRANSITION_DURATION.label: Transition Duration
TRANSITION_DURATION.description: Duration of fade transition in milliseconds. Only applies when transition effect is set to fade.

AUDIO_ENABLED.label: Enable Video Audio
AUDIO_ENABLED.description: Play audio when displaying video slides.

VIDEO_VOLUME.label: Video Volume
VIDEO_VOLUME.description: Volume level for video playback. 0 is muted, 1 is full volume. Defaults to muted for picture frame use.

video_test_mode.label: Video Test Mode
video_test_mode.description: Enable test mode for debugging video playback issues. Only use for troubleshooting.

PORTRAIT_PHOTO_PAIRING.label: Portrait Pairing
PORTRAIT_PHOTO_PAIRING.description: Automatically pair portrait-oriented photos side-by-side for better display.

voice_commands_enabled.label: Enable Voice Commands
voice_commands_enabled.description: Allow controlling the slideshow with voice commands (requires microphone).

voice_confidence_threshold.label: Confidence Threshold
voice_confidence_threshold.description: Minimum confidence level (0-1) required for voice recognition. Lower values are more permissive.

voice_next_keywords.label: Next Keywords
voice_next_keywords.description: Comma-separated list of words to advance to next slide.

voice_back_keywords.label: Back Keywords
voice_back_keywords.description: Comma-separated list of words to go to previous slide.

voice_pause_keywords.label: Pause Keywords
voice_pause_keywords.description: Comma-separated list of words to pause the slideshow.

voice_resume_keywords.label: Resume Keywords
voice_resume_keywords.description: Comma-separated list of words to resume the slideshow.

FILTER_PEOPLE.label: People
FILTER_PEOPLE.description: Show photos containing these people (comma-separated names from Apple Photos). Matches any listed person.

FILTER_PLACES.label: Places
FILTER_PLACES.description: Show photos from these locations (comma-separated, partial match). Matches any listed place.

FILTER_KEYWORD.label: Keywords
FILTER_KEYWORD.description: Show photos with these Apple Photos keywords (comma-separated). Matches any listed keyword.

FILTER_AND_OR.label: Combine Filters With
FILTER_AND_OR.description: AND = photo must match all filter types (e.g. person AND place). OR = photo can match any filter type.

album_name.label: Album Name
album_name.description: Name of the Apple Photos album to use for the slideshow.

NAV_HISTORY_SIZE.label: Cache Size
NAV_HISTORY_SIZE.description: Number of photos to keep in memory cache for faster loading.

log_level.label: Log Level
log_level.description: Amount of detail in log messages. DEBUG shows everything, ERROR shows only critical issues.

navigation_history_size.label: Navigation History Size
navigation_history_size.description: Number of previously viewed slides to keep in history for back navigation.
